revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Fujinoki Tomb); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1284705850 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|history=y}} {{WikiProject Archaeology}} {{WikiProject Historic sites|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Cemeteries|importance=low}} }} ==Untitled== I thought there would be more sources and information on this tomb but I didn't come across any that were more reputable than the Cambridge History. This is just a basic start. Please help it out if you can. [[User:Tortfeasor|Tortfeasor]] 05:04, 18 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Skeleton in Japan's cupboard== The [[Observer]] newspaper of London reported under the heading above on 9th April 1989 that Japanese archaeologists had made the unsettling discovery that the Fujinoki tomb was of clear Korean origin. The tomb contained a nobleman's pointed, gilded bronze shoes with tiny rings, and gilt-bronze crown, which were almost identical to exhibits in the Korean national Museum in Seoul. They said this contradicted the official early history of Japan, which claimed the imperial dynasty dated back to the origin of the nation, and was not of Korean descent. Koreans were said to have claimed that investigation of ancient imperial tombs had been forbidden for fear of revealing those Korean origins. [[User:NRPanikker|NRPanikker]] ([[User talk:NRPanikker|talk]]) 14:17, 23 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Fujinoki Tomb]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=804384617 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20110612074636/http://www.tenri-u.ac.jp/lifelng/dv457k0000007gvr.html to http://www.tenri-u.ac.jp/lifelng/dv457k0000007gvr.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 17:20, 8 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:113.38.56.146]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fujinoki_Tomb here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1284705850 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|history=y}} {{WikiProject Archaeology}} {{WikiProject Historic sites|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Cemeteries|importance=low}} }} ==Untitled== I thought there would be more sources and information on this tomb but I didn't come across any that were more reputable than the Cambridge History. This is just a basic start. Please help it out if you can. [[User:Tortfeasor|Tortfeasor]] 05:04, 18 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Skeleton in Japan's cupboard== The [[Observer]] newspaper of London reported under the heading above on 9th April 1989 that Japanese archaeologists had made the unsettling discovery that the Fujinoki tomb was of clear Korean origin. The tomb contained a nobleman's pointed, gilded bronze shoes with tiny rings, and gilt-bronze crown, which were almost identical to exhibits in the Korean national Museum in Seoul. They said this contradicted the official early history of Japan, which claimed the imperial dynasty dated back to the origin of the nation, and was not of Korean descent. Koreans were said to have claimed that investigation of ancient imperial tombs had been forbidden for fear of revealing those Korean origins. [[User:NRPanikker|NRPanikker]] ([[User talk:NRPanikker|talk]]) 14:17, 23 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Fujinoki Tomb]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=804384617 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20110612074636/http://www.tenri-u.ac.jp/lifelng/dv457k0000007gvr.html to http://www.tenri-u.ac.jp/lifelng/dv457k0000007gvr.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 17:20, 8 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
